stemHtml: What beam is used in the mapping mode of an airborne weather radar that can utilise two different beam shapes?

options.a: A cosecant squared beam effective up to a range of 150 NM.
options.b: A pencil beam effective up to a maximum range of 60 NM.
options.c: A cosecant squared beam effective up to a maximum of 50 NM to 60 NM.
options.d: A pencil beam effective up to a range of 150 NM.
